summary: Fixed frontend hover preview hit-testing and frame-relative preview positioning.
Updated Playwright preview specs to use raw snake_case API fields, wait for readiness, and scroll targets into view.
Fixed backend short-video preview generation and prevented publishing preview URLs when files are absent.
not_changed: Older broken preview rows were not backfilled.
validations: npx vitest run src/test/work-editor.test.tsx src/test/work-video-player.test.tsx src/test/blog-notion-workspace.test.tsx src/test/auth-csrf.test.ts
PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 npx playwright test tests/public-work-videos.spec.ts --grep "PF-044" --workers=1
curl verification for public-video-preview-1777023334596 preview assets
risks: Older pre-fix HLS rows may still reference preview URLs that 404.
The recording spec artifact copy is vulnerable to races if multiple Playwright runs target the same stable output file in parallel.
Lint warnings remain in unrelated backup/scripts/test files.
recommendation: Keep the recording spec serialized and add a reprocessing path if historical HLS videos also need repaired preview assets.
